section.heading: Qualified individuals
section.chapeau: Except as otherwise provided in this subchapter, an individual—

paragraph.content: who has attained the age of 65 on or before December 14, 1999;
who is a World War II veteran;

paragraph.chapeau: who is eligible for a supplemental security income benefit under subchapter XVI for—

subparagraph.content: the month in which this subchapter is enacted; and
the month in which the individual files an application for benefits under this subchapter;

paragraph.content: whose total benefit income is less than 75 percent of the Federal benefit rate under subchapter XVI;
who has filed an application for benefits under this subchapter; and
who is in compliance with all requirements imposed by the Commissioner of Social Security under this subchapter,

section.continuation: shall be a qualified individual for purposes of this subchapter.
section.sourceCredit: (Aug. 14, 1935, ch. 531, title VIII, § 802, as added Pub. L. 106–169, title II, § 251(a), Dec. 14, 1999, 113 Stat. 1844.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: For prior provisions, see note set out under section 1001 of this title.
